title: megalastrum galapagense
intro: Megalastrum galapagense is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae, commonly found in the wild in Ecuador. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Megalastrum galapagense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
